title: Wheels on the Bus Song | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
BEEP BEEP! The bus goes ROUND and ROUND!
Sing a bright Wheels on the Bus style ride with Benny and friends.
Toddlers hear simple action words, sounds, and safe classroom energy.
Kid-safe nursery rhyme fun for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
